name: ComproPago
description: Mexican fintech specializing in cash payments via 130,000+ retail locations (OXXO, 7-Eleven) for e-commerce.

seo.title: ComproPago — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: ComproPago: Mexican fintech specializing in cash payments via 130,000+ retail locations (OXXO, 7-Eleven) for e-commerce.

when_to_use: Cash payment acceptance via OXXO and 7-Eleven for unbanked Mexican buyers
Enabling cash-first checkout for Mexican e-commerce with 130k retail locations
Voucher-based payment flow for digital goods sold to unbanked users in Mexico
Offline payment collection for subscription services in cash-dominant Mexico

cons: Customer must physically pay at store
review.verdict: Essential for reaching Mexico's unbanked segment — pair with a card gateway, don't use standalone.
review.best_for: E-commerce merchants in Mexico needing cash payment coverage
review.not_for: Merchants only needing card payments or outside Mexico
